descriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes advance to Centennial Cup final against Humboldt Broncos after defeating Alberta champion Red Deer 9-1.
descriptionLong: The Richmond Sockeyes defeated Red Deer Rustlers 9-1 on April 17, 1987, to advance to the Centennial Cup western final against host Humboldt Broncos. Dave Tomlinson scored three goals to lead the Sockeyes' victory in their best-of-seven semifinal series. The western final begins April 20 in Humboldt, with the Sockeyes guaranteed a spot in the national championship tournament regardless of the outcome.

attribution.headline: Richmond Sockeyes bound for Centennial Cup either way
